title: Cobblemon Advancement Plaques
description: New Advancement Plaques for the Cobblemon Mod!

# Overview
If you love the Cobblemon Mod and want to change that boring old advancements into something more interesting, use this Cobblemon Advancement Plaques Resourcepack. Change the default advancement message into a Cobblemon themed achievement.

# Important
1. The **Advancement Plaques Mod** is required for this to work.

## [Resourcepack Discord](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/39e1d151-f787-4346-9014-f14dc996f94e.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
### Resourcepack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator using this Resourcepack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Resourcepack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Resourcepack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
